playbook.intent: Founder-as-PM rhythm: one weekly sync + structured async + Friday close - replaces standups/retros/1:1s for 2-3 person teams.
playbook.scope: Establish the minimum communication rhythm for a 2-3 person agency where the founder is also the PM. Replaces standups, retros, and 1:1s with one weekly sync + structured async + a Friday close-the-books ritual. Exit artifact: weekly cadence calendar + async templates + Friday close ritual live for 4 weeks.

success-criteria.criterion: Daily async standup template pinned + used
Founder spends 3h/week or less on PM overhead
Each team member confirms cadence in writing

stage.name: Pick the rhythm
stage.intent: Single weekly sync + async + Friday close.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once cadence accepted in writing by each team member.

stage.name: Run async standup

tasks.task: Tag scope-creep + risk in same thread

stage.decision-gate: Advance once 5 consecutive days of async runs cleanly.

stage.name: Weekly sync
stage.intent: 45 min, max - sync on plan, blockers, decisions.

tasks.task: Run agenda doc updated by each member
Decide on top-3 priorities for the week

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when meeting fits 45 min or less with decisions captured.

stage.name: Friday close + retro-lite

tasks.task: Each member posts wins, slips, next-week ask
Tag systemic issues for monthly retro

stage.decision-gate: Required: Friday close happens every week. Missing it triggers root-cause review.

extra.value: [Scrum-of-scrums for 20-person teams - out of scope, Replacing all real-time comms with async - keep one weekly sync]
[Active 2-3 person team (any mix of contractors + founder), Shared workspace (Slack / Notion / Linear / equivalent)]

[Adding daily syncs because async feels 'risky' - founder becomes bottleneck, Skipping Friday close because the week 'was not busy' - kills signal, Letting the weekly sync expand past 45 min - kills the budget]
['Did the weekly sync stay under 45 min?', 'Did the founder unblock within 4h each day?', 'Did Friday close actually happen every Friday?']

{human: faion get-content run-2-3-person-team-comms-without-a-pm --format md, agent: faion get-content run-2-3-person-team-comms-without-a-pm --format context, json: faion get-content run-2-3-person-team-comms-without-a-pm --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
